auto_fixes_applied.description: Added NOTADB startup probe (clean exit 2 instead of backtrace on non-SQLite files) — primary reviewer finding, fixed pre-codex

cross_runtime_findings.summary: Numeric threshold validation ran on quote-stripped args, silently turning 5'0 into 50.
cross_runtime_findings.fix: APPLIED: RAW_A/RAW_B captured pre-sanitization; all hq_num call sites use RAW_A; behavioral check: god-modules "5'0" → exit 2.

cross_runtime_findings.summary: unsafe-strings/type-search feature-detected tables only, not columns (FR-002) — partial schemas would emit raw sqlite errors instead of exit 3.
Flat-schema preflight incomplete (missed line_end/module_id/name/path); almost-main schemas could crash outside the exit-3 path.
cross_runtime_findings.evidence: preflight checked only modules table + line_start
cross_runtime_findings.fix: APPLIED: full column preflight + Sqlite3.Error around compare_bodies mapped to exit-3 refusal.

cross_runtime_findings.summary: GROUP_CONCAT list fields lacked inner ordering (FR-007 determinism across sqlite versions).
cross_runtime_findings.fix: APPLIED: ORDER BY inside aggregates (sqlite ≥3.44; dev 3.53, CI 3.45).

notes: Primary + spec-compliance inline (FR-001..015 swept post-fix); codex cross-runtime pass: 4 findings, all fixed and behaviorally re-verified (junk-db exit 2, quoted-threshold exit 2, selftest-health OK, 6 test suites green).
